nasb.text: Elijah came near to all the people and said, “How long will you hesitate between two opinions? If the Lord is God, follow Him; but if Baal, follow him.” But the people did not answer him a word.

esv.text: And Elijah came near to all the people and said, “How long will you go limping between two different opinions? If the Lord is God, follow him; but if Baal, then follow him.” And the people did not answer him a word.

cnv.text: 以利亞走近眾人說：“你們三心兩意，要到幾時呢？如果耶和華是　神，你們就應當隨從耶和華；如果巴力是　神，你們就應當隨從巴力。”眾人一句話也不回答。

ccb.text: 以利亚走到众人面前说：“你们三心二意要到什么时候呢？如果耶和华是上帝，你们当跟从祂；如果巴力是上帝，你们就跟从他吧！”他们都默不作声。
